items.name: The Black Dahlia Hat & Black Hat With Black Rose
items.description:
White Dahlia Hat - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/139669655047929

If you like the Hat, then click on the star / favorite, It will help!

More UGC Here - roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Danuk%27s%20Empire&CreatorType=Group

"The Dahlia" is a secret, blossoming in fire. Her beauty is as deceptive as the petals of an infernal flower. She incinerates memories to let oblivion bloom in their place, promising to bury the past to pave the way for the future. Her words are a melody that soothes the ear but conceals burning pain and betrayal. Enchanted by her father's shadow and the Path of Destruction, she seeks someone who can rekindle her flame.
